title: Cobblemon fast mounts
description: increases riding speed of bird/ufo/rocket cobblemon in 1.7+
body:
**Cobblemon Fast Mounts 1.7+**
📌 Description - Cobblemon Fast Mounts massively increases the riding speed of bird, UFO, and rocket mounts in Cobblemon 1.7.1. - I play with stamina turned off, and the bird/UFO/rocket mounts felt extremely slow, so I created this datapack to greatly boost their riding speed making them much faster, similar to how mounts used to feel when playing with ride on. this datapack is mostly intended for people who play with no stamina. - at the end of a day its a datapack feel free to edit the stats to whatever you want
✈️ mounts boosted flying - aerodactyl - altaria - braviary - bronzong - claydol - corviknight - drifblim - dusclnoir - flygon - forretress - golurk - gyarados - heracross - hydreigon - kilowattrel - klinklang - magnezone - metagross - noivern - salamence - staraptor - togekiss - tropius - volcarona
🐎 mounts boosted land not as fast as flying but more faster than default also some have jump stats boosted - arcanine - bouffalant - camerupt - crustle - cyclizar - darmanitan - dudunsparce - espathra - farigiraf - girafarig - lickilicky - mamoswine - mr mime - mudsdale - piloswine - rhyhorn - rhydon - rhyperior - serperior - sneasler - tauros - tyrantrum - ursaluna - venusaur
🌊 mounts boosted sea not as fast as flying but more faster than default also some have jump stats boosted - blastoise - dondozo - lapras - relicanth - seaking - sharpedo (just boosted jump stat) - wailmer - wailord
📥 Installation - Singleplayer: Place the .zip file into /saves/[WORLDNAME]/datapacks Place the .zip into /resourcepacks Enable in-game via ESC → Options → Resource Packs - Servers: Place the .zip into /world/datapacks (Folder name may differ — e.g., myworld or custom) If unsure, consult your host’s guide on adding datapacks.
